name: the-outsiders-eight-unconventional-ceos-and-their-radically-rational-blueprint-for-success
description: William Thorndike's study of eight unconventional CEOs who created extraordinary shareholder value through superior capital allocation — buybacks, acquisitions, and disciplined rationality.
useCase: Learn capital allocation from the best CEOs — how to deploy cash, when to buy back shares, when to acquire, and how to think like an outsider CEO.
knownRisks: Case studies may be difficult to replicate directly
Capital allocation requires long time horizons
